content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty modestly up (+0.22%) but breadth mixed: PSU banks weak (-1.14%), IT/Banks soft, while Metal/Energy/Pharma lead. VIX cooled (-5.3%) suggesting some calm. Book is 60% deployed with multiple positions near SL — focus is position management and trailing SLs on winners, not new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "new_target": 85.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op: keeping SL at 76.50 (just above S2 78.36 / prior swing low). Stock down 3.5% but Q4 was strong (+35% PAT, GNPA 1.45%) and PSU bank theme intact. CMP 78.88 above VWAP 78.50 — holding above key level. Will not loosen SL; will reassess if 76.50 breaks."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.38,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Best performer (+6.5%). SL already at 1032 (above breakeven, locking ~5% gain). Holding existing trailing SL — strong Q4, GNPA <1%, dividend hike +60%. Letting it run toward 1095 target. Would consider trailing further only if price clears 1060 cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position down -1.7%, SL at 119 still ~3.6% away. Gold correcting near-term but long-term thesis intact (Akshaya Tritiya, INR weakness). Hold as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op preservation: SL at 1418 already above entry (1413), locking breakeven+. P&L only +1.8% (below the +2% trigger), so not aggressive trailing yet. Strong Q4 (+27% PAT, double-digit volume), fresh 52w high. If hits +4% will trail further."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 20,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.2% with Q4 results in T+2 (Apr 30) — Street expectations weak (EBITDA -4% YoY, margin compression). Binary event risk into a position already bleeding. Better to exit pre-event vs sit on top of negative read-through risk from Nestle's blockbuster setting a high bar. Capital preservation."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op: SL at 406 already above entry 404.50 (breakeven+). P&L +1.5% (just below +2% trigger). Power sector strong, near 52w high, Q4 results May 15. Hold positioning."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.4%, SL at 1775 only 0.3% away. Today's intraday: gapped to 1816 then sold off to 1770 — distribution after 39% April rally. Cannot tighten SL further (would trigger immediately). Keep current SL; if breaks 1775, exits cleanly. Stretched extension into Q4 print is uncomfortable but thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1734.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op: SL already at entry 1734 (breakeven). P&L +1.4%, just below +2% threshold. Organon mega-deal catalyst, pharma sector +0.4% with 5.3x volume. Let it run; will trail tighter at +4%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,
      "new_target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op: P&L only -0.6%, SL at 318 (0.4% away). Defensive transmission play, Q4 results May 19. Keep tight SL given small risk budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT 23.65 — pharma sector continues constructive (SUNPHARMA Organon catalyst). Letting pending order work; not stacking another. Will reassess at next tick."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT 612 still working. Metal sector strong today (+1.17%). Let pending order fill or expire; no new action."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT 443 working. Power cluster already heavy in book (NTPC + POWERGRID + TORNTPOWER + NTPC via PNBHOUSING financing not really). Cluster discipline: do NOT stack. Letting existing limit work but not adding to power further today."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "reasoning": "P&L -3.5%, SL 76.50 below S2 (76.95). Q4 fundamentals strong; let SL define exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.38,
      "reasoning": "Best performer +6.5%; trailing SL already locks ~5% gain. Let it run to 1095 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position; existing SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry. Will trail to 1.02x entry = ~1441 if P&L hits +4%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results in T+2 with weak Street expectations and stock already in drawdown. Exit pre-event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry. Power demand record; Q4 May 15 catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1775.00,
      "reasoning": "SL only 0.3% below CMP — cannot tighten. Let SL fire if 1775 breaks."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1734.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; Organon catalyst alive. Trail tighter at +4%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL appropriate for defensive play; small unrealized loss."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "INDUSINDBK strong Q4 turnaround +6% on day with brokerage upgrades — track for swing entry on pullback to 870-880. SUNPHARMA mega-deal worth adding only on dip to 1720-1730. Avoid TATACHEM (Morgan Stanley double-downgrade, Q3 loss). MANAPPURAM and PIRAMALFIN already extended — chase risk. ONGC has regulatory overhang (APPCB stop-order on Mori#05) — pass.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 60% deployed with multiple positions sitting on tight SLs and three pending limit BUYs (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) — effective deployment is higher. Per the deployment-hysteresis rule, NO new entries today. Power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + TORNTPOWER + pending TATAPOWER) is already concentrated — must NOT add more. Focus this week is risk management: HUL exit pre-Q4 is the key risk-reduction action. PNBHOUSING is the standout winner; let it run with locked-in SL. Today's win-rate context (21% over 14 trades) reinforces caution: not adding low-conviction names."
}
